headlines.title: Bernstein Sets Long-Term Oil Price Target At $75 Per Barrel
headlines.summary: Wall Street analyst Bernstein Research has established $75 per barrel as a reasonable long-term oil price target for equity valuations, pointing to rising marginal costs and declining reserves.
